command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khế ước %s &LoanContract.Nested.Message.v; trong danh mục khế ước.' else N'The contract %s is &LoanContract.Nested.Message.e;.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khế ước %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the contract %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khế ước %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the contract %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã khế ước %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The item %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end
select convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) as cookie from @@table where ma_ku = @ma_ku return

if exists(select * from @@table where &LoanContract.Nested.Key.a;) begin select 'ma_ku' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_ku)) as message return end &UnitBeforeInsert; select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID, @status = case when @tinh_trang in ('1', '2') then '1' else '0' end update @ctdmku set ma_ku = @ma_ku update @ctdmku2 set ma_ku = @ma_ku

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ku' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_ku.OldValue)) as message return end
if (@ma_ku <> $ma_ku.OldValue) begin if exists(select * from @@table where &LoanContract.Nested.Key.a; and ma_ku <> $ma_ku.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ku' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_ku)) as message return end
declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_ku.OldValue)) if exists(select * from cdku where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ku' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ku' as field, @message as message return end
if $ctdmku.NewValue = $ctdmku.OldValue update ctdmku set ma_ku = @ma_ku where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue if $ctdmku2.NewValue = $ctdmku2.OldValue update ctdmku2 set ma_ku = @ma_ku where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue end update @ctdmku set ma_ku = @ma_ku update @ctdmku2 set ma_ku = @ma_ku if $ctdmku.NewValue <> $ctdmku.OldValue delete ctdmku where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue if $ctdmku2.NewValue <> $ctdmku2.OldValue delete ctdmku2 where ma_ku = $ma_ku.OldValue
&UnitBeforeUpdate;

if $ctdmku.NewValue <> $ctdmku.OldValue insert into ctdmku select * from @ctdmku if $ctdmku2.NewValue <> $ctdmku2.OldValue insert into ctdmku2 select * from @ctdmku2 update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID, status = case when tinh_trang in ('1', '2') then '1' else '0' end where ma_ku = @ma_ku
&UnitPostUpdate;

declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_ku)) if exists(select * from cdku where ma_ku = @ma_ku) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select * from ct00 where ma_ku = @ma_ku) begin select @message as message return end delete ctdmku where ma_ku = @ma_ku delete ctdmku2 where ma_ku = @ma_ku
&UnitPostDelete;
